infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Lilo uses your current location to show available drivers near you, calculate your pickup time, and display your ride progress on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Lilo uses your location to show available drivers near you, track your ride in real-time, and provide accurate arrival estimates, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Lilo needs access to your location to ensure your driver can find you and to track your journey for safety purposes while the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lilo requires access to your camera to allow you to take a profile photo and to scan documents for identity verification during signup.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lilo needs access to your photo library so you can upload an existing profile picture or verification documents.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Lilo uses your current location to show available drivers near you, calculate your pickup time, and display your ride progress on the map. For example, when you request a ride, your location is shared with your driver so they can pick you up.

plugins.photosPermission: Lilo needs access to your photo library so you can upload an existing profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Lilo requires access to your camera to allow you to take a profile photo.
